data.body: WS3 (win-attic-wren) LANDED: commit 0c89397cc. Two LLM-routed enumeration overlays T13 (prohibition->call-sites MIGRATED/EXEMPTED/UNCOVERED) + T14 (new-ref->workflow-trigger INCLUDED/EXCLUDED/NO_FILTER + release-infra), both fail-open. Used Txx ids (G5 taken; is_overlay needs Txx) per 8 criticals. CANONICAL_LLM 35 in sync. ADR 0034. Closed both attestations. 5/11 (WS1,6,7,2,3). Stack tip 0c89397cc. Next: WS11 removal-rationale (Chesterton's Fence, A1 dual).
